name: hol-guard-plugin
description: Codex plugin for HOL Guard local AI harness protection across Codex, Claude Code, and other agent/plugin systems.

interface.shortDescription: Protect Codex, Claude Code, and other AI harnesses.
interface.longDescription: HOL Guard Plugin teaches Codex how to install and operate HOL Guard across Codex, Claude Code, Copilot CLI, Cursor, Gemini, Hermes, OpenClaw, OpenCode, and Antigravity. It also guides plugin-scanner checks for Codex plugins, Claude Code project surfaces, skills, MCP servers, and marketplace packages.
defaultPrompt: Protect Claude Code with HOL Guard.
Scan this Codex plugin before release.
Show Guard receipts and pending approvals.
